name: -a
--add
options.description: Add folders to the current window

options.name: --launch-or-new-window
options.description: Only open a new window if the application is open

name: -w
--wait
options.description: Wait for the files to be closed before returning

name: -s
--stay
options.description: Keep the application activated after closing the file

name: -h
--help
options.description: Show a help message and exit
